visualizerParams.title: Centripetal Force with Angular Velocity
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current function uses tangential velocity `v`. Refactor it to accept angular velocity `ω` instead, using the relationship `v = rω` to derive the force formula `F = mrω²`.

solution.explanation: Using angular velocity `ω` simplifies the centripetal force calculation in many physical scenarios. Substituting `v = rω` into `mv²/r` gives `m(rω)²/r`, which reduces to `mrω²`. This avoids the division by `r` in the final calculation.
